languages.text: "Я приглядываю за сектором Бионика по всем заветам Императора. И, разумеется, вашим приказам. Теперь ни одна травма не может стать преградой между слугой Бога-Императора и служением Ему — мы подняли на ноги всех, кого другие списали бы в утиль".

traits.locale_text: "Я приглядываю за сектором Бионика по всем заветам Императора. И, разумеется, вашим приказам. Теперь ни одна травма не может стать преградой между слугой Бога-Императора и служением Ему — мы подняли на ноги всех, кого другие списали бы в утиль".

languages.text: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."
languages.original_text: "Я приглядываю за сектором Бионика по всем заветам Императора. И, разумеется, вашим приказам. Теперь ни одна травма не может стать преградой между слугой Бога-Императора и служением Ему — мы подняли на ноги всех, кого другие списали бы в утиль".

traits.locale_text: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

"I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

"I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

languages.text: 「私は皇帝のすべての誓約に従って、バイオニカ部門を統括しています。そしてもちろん、貴方の命令に従っています。今後は、傷を負った者も、神皇帝のしもべである者は、その義務を果たすことが許されます。他者には廃棄物と見なされていた者たちにも、新たな命を吹き込みました」
languages.original_text: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'yı İmparator'un tüm ahitlerine uygun olarak denetliyorum. Tabii ki emirlerinize de. Artık sakatlık, Tanrı İmparator'un hiçbir kulunun görevini yerine getirmesine engel olmayacak. Başkalarının hurda olarak gözden çıkaracağı herkese yeni bir hayat verdik."
languages.original_text: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'yı İmparator'un tüm ahitlerine uygun olarak denetliyorum. Tabii ki emirlerinize de. Artık sakatlık, Tanrı İmparator'un hiçbir kulunun görevini yerine getirmesine engel olmayacak. Başkalarının hurda olarak gözden çıkaracağı herkese yeni bir hayat verdik."

languages.text: “我正依照帝皇的圣约管理仿生区——当然，还有您的命令。如今，任何伤势都无法阻挡神皇之仆履行圣职。我们将为那些曾被视作废铁之人，注入崭新的生机。”
languages.original_text: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

traits.locale_text: “我正依照帝皇的圣约管理仿生区——当然，还有您的命令。如今，任何伤势都无法阻挡神皇之仆履行圣职。我们将为那些曾被视作废铁之人，注入崭新的生机。”

languages.text: "Ich überwache den Sektor Bionica im Einklang mit allen Bestimmungen des Imperators. Und Euren Befehlen natürlich. Verletzungen hindern keinen Diener des Gottimperators mehr daran, seine Pflicht zu erfüllen ... wir haben allen Seelen, die andere längst abgeschrieben hätte, neues Leben eingehaucht."
languages.original_text: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

traits.locale_text: "Ich überwache den Sektor Bionica im Einklang mit allen Bestimmungen des Imperators. Und Euren Befehlen natürlich. Verletzungen hindern keinen Diener des Gottimperators mehr daran, seine Pflicht zu erfüllen ... wir haben allen Seelen, die andere längst abgeschrieben hätte, neues Leben eingehaucht."

languages.text: « J'administre le secteur Bionica dans le respect des préceptes édictés par l'Empereur et conformément à vos instructions, bien sûr. Désormais, plus aucune blessure quelle qu'elle soit n'empêchera les serviteurs de notre seigneur et maître d'accomplir leur devoir, car nous avons insufflé une vie nouvelle aux malheureux dont tant d'autres se seraient débarrassés sans autre forme de procès. »
languages.original_text: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

traits.locale_text: « J'administre le secteur Bionica dans le respect des préceptes édictés par l'Empereur et conformément à vos instructions, bien sûr. Désormais, plus aucune blessure quelle qu'elle soit n'empêchera les serviteurs de notre seigneur et maître d'accomplir leur devoir, car nous avons insufflé une vie nouvelle aux malheureux dont tant d'autres se seraient débarrassés sans autre forme de procès. »

languages.text: «Estoy supervisando el Sector Bionica siguiendo los dictámenes del Emperador. Y, naturalmente, sus órdenes. Ahora, las lesiones no serán óbice que ningún siervo del Dios Emperador cumpla su deber. Hemos dado nueva vida a aquellos a quienes otros hubieran desechado por inservibles».
languages.original_text: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy supervisando el Sector Bionica siguiendo los dictámenes del Emperador. Y, naturalmente, sus órdenes. Ahora, las lesiones no serán óbice que ningún siervo del Dios Emperador cumpla su deber. Hemos dado nueva vida a aquellos a quienes otros hubieran desechado por inservibles».
